data.title: Tesla Charging Stations Cut From Rebate Program By Canadian Province: 'Most People Would Support Their Removal' From Subsidy List, Says Minister
data.description: Tesla Inc.'s (NASDAQ: TSLA) electric vehicle charging stations and home batteries have been excluded from rebates in the Canadian province of British Columbia. This move comes in the wake of tariffs imposed by the U.S. on Canada.

data.description: Major U.S. indices experienced turbulent sessions on Thursday, with the S&P 500 entering technical correction territory.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Soars Out of Bankruptcy, Says Will Cancel Old Stock And Expects To Re-List 'As Soon As Reasonably Practicable'
data.description: Spirit Aviation Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Spirit Airlines, LLC (OTC: SAVEQ) announced that it has successfully completed its financial restructuring.
